nasb.text: The young men of the rulers of the provinces went out first; and Ben-hadad sent out and they told him, saying, “Men have come out from Samaria.”

esv.text: The servants of the governors of the districts went out first. And Ben-hadad sent out scouts, and they reported to him, “Men are coming out from Samaria.”

cnv.text: 跟從各省省長的年輕人首先出發。便．哈達派人去察看，他們回報他說：“有人從撒瑪利亞出來了。”

ccb.text: 省长属下的青年军率先出城。便·哈达派出的巡逻队禀告他说：“有人从撒玛利亚城出来了。”
